headline: ONEOK: Guidance Is Rising, Tailwinds Are Building, And Q2 Earnings Are On Deck
summary: ONEOK's Q1 beats raise 2026 EBITDA/EPS guidance; data center demand and NGL/LNG tailwinds support a 4.6% yield. Click here to read this OKE stock update.
